overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring vibrant neon digital billboards, reflective wet pavement, and modern architecture. The footage is clearly from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing high-quality rendered environments with sparse pedestrian activity and prominent advertising displays including a large 'Kiroshi' billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic pedestrian plaza with digital advertising towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza toward a large digital billboard structure

notable_agents.action: cybernetically enhanced character sitting on bench looking at a device

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure wrapped with multiple digital advertisement screens
large billboard displaying a robotic face with 'KIROSHI' text
wooden benches with yellow seating surfaces arranged along the walkway
mature trees with dense foliage planted in raised planters
green cylindrical trash can near the benches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic plaza at night, illuminated by vibrant neon advertisements on a tall curved digital tower to the right. The camera walks forward past wooden benches and ornamental trees, approaching a seated character with visible cybernetic implants resting near a large 'Kiroshi' billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching modern building entrance with dynamic LED canopy

events.description: colorful LED ceiling panels above building entrance shift through rainbow colors illuminating the plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward a modern building entrance with a vibrant illuminated canopy

notable_agents.action: person walking toward the building entrance ahead

entered.detail: large dark facade with glass doors and illuminated signage
overhead structure with shifting colored lights in pink, purple, green, and blue
narrow canal of still water reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: Moving past the seated character, the camera approaches a modern building entrance featuring a striking LED canopy that cycles through vibrant colors. The reflective water feature becomes visible on the right while the digital tower recedes into the background, and a distant pedestrian walks toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway along reflective water feature with vending machines

events.description: camera turns right to follow the path alongside the water feature

agents.ego_description: turning right at the plaza to walk along the water feature, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person standing near the water taking a photo or looking at a device

entered.detail: elevated highway or walkway crossing above the plaza with green lighting
row of automated vending machines with illuminated displays
large advertisement with 'COLA' text in white letters
massive mature tree with thick trunk and sprawling branches

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to follow a path alongside the reflective water feature, passing under an overpass structure. Vending machines and a large 'COLA' billboard appear on the right while a massive ornamental tree comes into view ahead. The environment feels more enclosed as the camera moves away from the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined promenade with distant corporate skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the water feature path, passing the large tree and approaching distant skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench near the water feature

entered.detail: tall corporate buildings with illuminated windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the promenade with the large ornamental tree now prominent on the left. The camera passes additional pedestrians seated on benches while distant skyscrapers rise ahead against the night sky. The reflective water feature remains a constant element on the left as the journey continues through the neon-lit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a neon-lit futuristic plaza that shifts from an open public square toward the entrance of a modern architectural complex. It begins by gliding past wooden benches and ornamental trees, guided by the glow of a tall curved digital tower and a prominent Kiroshi billboard. As the camera approaches a seated character with cybernetic implants, the perspective pushes forward, causing the digital tower to recede into the background. The scene then opens up to reveal a reflective water feature on the right before turning toward a building entrance crowned by a vibrant, color-cycling LED canopy. Finally, the movement culminates as the camera nears the entrance, following the path of a distant pedestrian walking into the structure.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an enclosed urban corridor into an expansive neon-lit promenade. It begins by turning right to follow a path alongside a reflective water feature, passing beneath the heavy shadow of an overpass. As the camera moves away from the open plaza, the environment tightens with vending machines and a large COLA billboard appearing on the right before a massive ornamental tree emerges ahead. The scene then opens up as the camera continues along the promenade with the tree now positioned to the left and pedestrians seated on benches. Finally, the view expands to reveal towering skyscrapers rising against the night sky, while the reflective water feature remains a constant guide through the vibrant city landscape.
